Yemo is the twin son of [[Manu]].

He was sacrificed to stop [[Anti-Lambda]]

His myth is quite unclear and it is unknown whether it can ever be told

[[Category:Gaiad]]
[[Category:Underseer]]
[[sn:Yemo]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
